text:
EXPLANATION: The dataset "Chemical reactions from US patents (1976-Sep2016)" by Daniel Lowe is a well-known, real Figshare dataset posted on 2017-06-13, widely cited across numerous peer-reviewed papers and repositories, with a dedicated Figshare page and DOI (10.6084/m9.figshare.5104873). The cited title is a slight shortening of the full title but matches the same dataset with the correct author and year.
LINK: https://figshare.com/articles/dataset/Chemical_reactions_from_US_patents_1976-Sep2016_/5104873
FOUND_TITLE: Chemical reactions from US patents (1976-Sep2016)
FOUND_AUTHORS: Daniel Lowe
FOUND_YEAR: 2017
VERDICT: UNLIKELY
